detail.title: Feb 2026 Product Innovation
detail.content:
Below are this month’s new Creator Center features and updates. These are designed to help your agency drive more content output, improve creator monetization, and scale performance more efficiently. --- ## 💸 Refundable Sample at Checkout
**📌 What it is:** Creators can now turn a self-purchase into a Refundable Sample directly at checkout. If eligible, they can toggle “Refundable Sample,” purchase the product, post content, and receive a refund after hitting required sales goals - no seller approval needed. **💡 Why it matters** **for agencies:** * Removes friction in securing products for content * Speeds up content production (no waiting on approvals) * Increases creator participation in affiliate content * Improves conversion by aligning creator intent with product selection ⏩ **Agency action:** Encourage creators to use this for products they already plan to buy, use for fast-turnaround content or trending products, and incorporate into creator workflows to reduce delays 👉 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=6918873955796749&role=1&course_type=1&from=search). --- ## 🚀 TikTok Shop Creator Pilot Program Update
**📌 What it is:** Creators in the program can now post significantly more shoppable videos. * <5K followers: up to 3/day (21/week) * 5K+ followers: unlimited shoppable posts **💡 Why it matters** **for agencies:** * Unlocks higher content volume and faster testing * Enables rapid iteration on hooks, formats, and products * Increases chances of finding winning content * Supports scaling high-performing creators **⏩ Agency action:** Push creators to increase posting frequency, test multiple variations of content quickly, and identify top-performing formats and double down. 👉 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=7264111224227597&lang=en). --- ## 👀 Growth Actions in Creator Center
**📌 What it is:** A new personalized recommendation system in Creator Center that suggests next steps based on performance, with clear explanations of what to improve and why. **💡 Why it matters** **for agencies:** * Makes coaching more data-driven and targeted * Helps identify blockers to growth faster * Reduces guesswork in content and strategy decisions * Supports consistent performance improvement **⏩ Agency action:** Review Growth Actions during creator check-ins, use insights to guide content and posting strategy, and prioritize actions that unlock GMV growth. 👉 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=4459774766876447). --- ## ✨ Discover: What to Promote Next
**📌 What it is:** An improved discovery experience in Creator Center that helps creators find products to promote through: * New Arrivals * Curated Choices * Rankings (personalized recommendations) **💡 Why it matters** **for agencies:** * Reduces time spent searching for products * Surfaces high-potential and trending SKUs earlier * Improves product-market fit for creators * Supports more consistent content pipelines **⏩ Agency action:** Guide creators to check Discover regularly, align product selection with creator niche and audience, and use insights to plan upcoming content 👉 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=2448311311435551&lang=en). --- ## 📌 **TLDR;** This month’s updates focus on: * Increasing content velocity (Pilot Program, Refundable Samples) * Improving creator decision-making (Growth Actions, Discover) * Reducing friction in workflows (faster product access, better guidance) 👉 Focus on helping creators post more, test faster, and choose better products. ---
